text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I must say, your training routine is fairly basic, but
you seem to be working well as a team!
However...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Knowing how you care about your trainee above
all else, I can't imagine this is all you have in store
for her. I'll check back on your next session!
